基因检测常用于反复发生恶性心律失常甚至猝死的幸存者，以及发病年龄较轻、具有家族遗传史且高度怀疑离子通道病的病人。离子通道病种类繁多，同一种离子通道的不同变异可有不同的临床表型，而同一种临床表型可由不同离子通道病产生。目前初步明确的常见离子通道病包括长 QT 间期综合征、短 QT 间期综合征、Brugada 综合征、早期复极综合征、儿茶酚胺敏感性室性心动过速、特发性心室颤动、遗传性心脏传导阻滞及家族性心房颤动等。基因检测有助于筛查家系中潜在的病人，明确基因缺陷及基因型与表型的关系，并指导治疗方案，然而目前仍有很多离子通道病的致病基因尚未完全阐明。", "guideline_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "source_types": {"relationType": "supported_by_evidence", "evidence_count": 1, "source_page": "N/A", "batch_id": "FOUNDATION-CARD-20260624-001", "evidence_id": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00159", "scope_filter_rule": "CDSS查询证据时必须按当前疾病或大类过滤 disease_code", "document_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "evidence_scope_code": "DIS-CARD-CAD-ACS", "schema_version": "V1.4", "source_version": "第10版", "scope_governance_batch": "20260714_证据范围字段回填", "updated_at": "2026-07-14 20:38:16", "recommendation_class": "N/A", "id": "REL-CD882AE75C92", "evidence_ids": ["EVD-CARD-FOUND-00159"], "review_status": "approved", "segment_id": "LINE-5753", "source_name": "《内科学（第10版）》.docx", "source_section": "第三篇 循环系统疾病", "disease_code": "DIS-CARD-CAD-ACS", "document_ids": ["DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6"], "target_code": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00159", "source_names": ["《内科学（第10版）》.docx"], "confidence": 1.0, "source_type": "authoritative_textbook", "scope_filter_required": true, "clinical_review_status": "not_applicable", "evidence_text": "2. 肌钙蛋白 严重心衰或心衰失代偿期病人的肌钙蛋白可有轻微升高，但心衰病人检测肌钙蛋白更重要的目的是明确是否存在急性冠脉综合征。肌钙蛋白升高，特别是同时伴有脑钠肽升高，是心衰预后的强预测因子。", "guideline_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "source_types": ["authoritative_textbook"], "updated_by": "codex", "formal_cdss_ready": false, "provenance_records_json": "[{\"document_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\",\"segment_id\":\"LINE-5753\",\"source_name\":\"《内科学（第10版）》.docx\",\"source_type\":\"authoritative_textbook\",\"source_version\":\"第10版\",\"source_section\":\"第三篇 循环系统疾病\",\"source_page\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_text\":\"2. 肌钙蛋白 严重心衰或心衰失代偿期病人的肌钙蛋白可有轻微升高，但心衰病人检测肌钙蛋白更重要的目的是明确是否存在急性冠脉综合征。肌钙蛋白升高，特别是同时伴有脑钠肽升高，是心衰预后的强预测因子。\",\"recommendation_class\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_level\":\"N/A\",\"guideline_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\"}]", "evidence_level": "N/A", "source_code": "DIS-CARD-CAD-ACS", "relationCategory": "evidence"}

{"relationType": "supported_by_evidence", "evidence_count": 1, "source_page": "N/A", "batch_id": "FOUNDATION-CARD-20260624-001", "evidence_id": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00347", "scope_filter_rule": "CDSS查询证据时必须按当前疾病或大类过滤 disease_code", "document_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "evidence_scope_code": "DIS-CARD-CHD-PS", "schema_version": "V1.4", "source_version": "第10版", "scope_governance_batch": "20260714_证据范围字段回填", "updated_at": "2026-07-14 20:38:16", "recommendation_class": "N/A", "id": "REL-AC9476D05591", "evidence_ids": ["EVD-CARD-FOUND-00347"], "review_status": "approved", "segment_id": "LINE-5531", "source_name": "《内科学（第10版）》.docx", "source_section": "第三篇 循环系统疾病", "disease_code": "DIS-CARD-CHD-PS", "document_ids": ["DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6"], "target_code": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00347", "source_names": ["《内科学（第10版）》.docx"], "confidence": 1.0, "source_type": "authoritative_textbook", "scope_filter_required": true, "clinical_review_status": "not_applicable", "evidence_text": "8. 心脏瓣膜的介入治疗 从 20 世纪 80 年代开始的瓣膜球囊扩张成形技术到 21 世纪初的经皮瓣膜植入或修补技术，瓣膜病的介入治疗技术进展迅速，适应证不断扩大。其中主动脉瓣、二尖瓣和肺动脉瓣狭窄的介入治疗技术日趋成熟，瓣膜反流疾病的介入治疗也在不断探索中。", "guideline_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "source_types": ["authoritative_textbook"], "updated_by": "codex", "formal_cdss_ready": false, "provenance_records_json": "[{\"document_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\",\"segment_id\":\"LINE-5531\",\"source_name\":\"《内科学（第10版）》.docx\",\"source_type\":\"authoritative_textbook\",\"source_version\":\"第10版\",\"source_section\":\"第三篇 循环系统疾病\",\"source_page\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_text\":\"8. 心脏瓣膜的介入治疗 从 20 世纪 80 年代开始的瓣膜球囊扩张成形技术到 21 世纪初的经皮瓣膜植入或修补技术，瓣膜病的介入治疗技术进展迅速，适应证不断扩大。其中主动脉瓣、二尖瓣和肺动脉瓣狭窄的介入治疗技术日趋成熟，瓣膜反流疾病的介入治疗也在不断探索中。\",\"recommendation_class\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_level\":\"N/A\",\"guideline_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\"}]", "evidence_level": "N/A", "source_code": "DIS-CARD-CHD-PS", "relationCategory": "evidence"}

{"relationType": "supported_by_evidence", "evidence_count": 1, "source_page": "N/A", "batch_id": "FOUNDATION-CARD-20260624-001", "evidence_id": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00309", "scope_filter_rule": "CDSS查询证据时必须按当前疾病或大类过滤 disease_code", "document_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "evidence_scope_code": "DIS-CARD-CM-RCM", "schema_version": "V1.4", "source_version": "第10版", "scope_governance_batch": "20260714_证据范围字段回填", "updated_at": "2026-07-14 20:38:16", "recommendation_class": "N/A", "id": "REL-62FA9B99555C", "evidence_ids": ["EVD-CARD-FOUND-00309"], "review_status": "approved", "segment_id": "LINE-9011", "source_name": "《内科学（第10版）》.docx", "source_section": "第三篇 循环系统疾病", "disease_code": "DIS-CARD-CM-RCM", "document_ids": ["DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6"], "target_code": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00309", "source_names": ["《内科学（第10版）》.docx"], "confidence": 1.0, "source_type": "authoritative_textbook", "scope_filter_required": true, "clinical_review_status": "not_applicable", "evidence_text": "限制型心肌病（restrictive cardiomyopathy，RCM）是一组以限制性心室充盈障碍为特征的混合性心肌病，其预后较差，5 年生存期仅约 30%。", "guideline_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "source_types": ["authoritative_textbook"], "updated_by": "codex", "formal_cdss_ready": false, "provenance_records_json": "[{\"document_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\",\"segment_id\":\"LINE-9011\",\"source_name\":\"《内科学（第10版）》.docx\",\"source_type\":\"authoritative_textbook\",\"source_version\":\"第10版\",\"source_section\":\"第三篇 循环系统疾病\",\"source_page\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_text\":\"限制型心肌病（restrictive cardiomyopathy，RCM）是一组以限制性心室充盈障碍为特征的混合性心肌病，其预后较差，5 年生存期仅约 30%。\",\"recommendation_class\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_level\":\"N/A\",\"guideline_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\"}]", "evidence_level": "N/A", "source_code": "DIS-CARD-CM-RCM", "relationCategory": "evidence"}

{"relationType": "supported_by_evidence", "evidence_count": 1, "source_page": "N/A", "batch_id": "FOUNDATION-CARD-20260624-001", "evidence_id": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00121", "scope_filter_rule": "CDSS查询证据时必须按当前疾病或大类过滤 disease_code", "document_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "evidence_scope_code": "DIS-CARD-CAD-ATHEROSCLEROSIS", "schema_version": "V1.4", "source_version": "第10版", "scope_governance_batch": "20260714_证据范围字段回填", "updated_at": "2026-07-14 20:38:16", "recommendation_class": "N/A", "id": "REL-7C792FCA4C6B", "evidence_ids": ["EVD-CARD-FOUND-00121"], "review_status": "approved", "segment_id": "LINE-7147", "source_name": "《内科学（第10版）》.docx", "source_section": "第三篇 循环系统疾病", "disease_code": "DIS-CARD-CAD-ATHEROSCLEROSIS", "document_ids": ["DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6"], "target_code": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00121", "source_names": ["《内科学（第10版）》.docx"], "confidence": 1.0, "source_type": "authoritative_textbook", "scope_filter_required": true, "clinical_review_status": "not_applicable", "evidence_text": "1. 年龄、性别 动脉粥样硬化的发生率随年龄而增加。临床上多见于 40 岁以上中老年，49 岁以后进展较快，近年来发病年龄有年轻化趋势。男性发生率高于女性，发病年龄也较女性提前约 10 年，可能与雌激素的抗动脉粥样硬化作用有关，但女性在绝经期后发病率迅速增加。年龄和性别属于不可改变的危险因素。", "guideline_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "source_types": ["authoritative_textbook"], "updated_by": "codex", "formal_cdss_ready": false, "provenance_records_json": "[{\"document_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\",\"segment_id\":\"LINE-7147\",\"source_name\":\"《内科学（第10版）》.docx\",\"source_type\":\"authoritative_textbook\",\"source_version\":\"第10版\",\"source_section\":\"第三篇 循环系统疾病\",\"source_page\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_text\":\"1. 年龄、性别 动脉粥样硬化的发生率随年龄而增加。临床上多见于 40 岁以上中老年，49 岁以后进展较快，近年来发病年龄有年轻化趋势。男性发生率高于女性，发病年龄也较女性提前约 10 年，可能与雌激素的抗动脉粥样硬化作用有关，但女性在绝经期后发病率迅速增加。年龄和性别属于不可改变的危险因素。\",\"recommendation_class\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_level\":\"N/A\",\"guideline_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\"}]", "evidence_level": "N/A", "source_code": "DIS-CARD-CAD-ATHEROSCLEROSIS", "relationCategory": "evidence"}

{"relationType": "supported_by_evidence", "evidence_count": 1, "source_page": "N/A", "batch_id": "FOUNDATION-CARD-20260624-001", "evidence_id": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00130", "scope_filter_rule": "CDSS查询证据时必须按当前疾病或大类过滤 disease_code", "document_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "evidence_scope_code": "DIS-CARD-CAD-CHD", "schema_version": "V1.4", "source_version": "第10版", "scope_governance_batch": "20260714_证据范围字段回填", "updated_at": "2026-07-14 20:38:16", "recommendation_class": "N/A", "id": "REL-FD57ECB790A3", "evidence_ids": ["EVD-CARD-FOUND-00130"], "review_status": "approved", "segment_id": "LINE-5511", "source_name": "《内科学（第10版）》.docx", "source_section": "第三篇 循环系统疾病", "disease_code": "DIS-CARD-CAD-CHD", "document_ids": ["DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6"], "target_code": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00130", "source_names": ["《内科学（第10版）》.docx"], "confidence": 1.0, "source_type": "authoritative_textbook", "scope_filter_required": true, "clinical_review_status": "not_applicable", "evidence_text": "1. 经皮冠状动脉介入术（percutaneous coronary intervention，PCI） 治疗冠心病的一种最常用、最成熟的介入技术，它是在血管造影仪的引导下，通过特制的导管、导丝、球囊、支架等，对狭窄或阻塞的冠状动脉进行血运重建的治疗方法。操作器械的改进，尤其是药物支架的出现大大改善了冠心病病人的预后和生活质量。目前还有药物球囊、生物可吸收支架等新技术应用于临床。", "guideline_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "source_types": ["authoritative_textbook"], "updated_by": "codex", "formal_cdss_ready": false, "provenance_records_json": "[{\"document_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\",\"segment_id\":\"LINE-5511\",\"source_name\":\"《内科学（第10版）》.docx\",\"source_type\":\"authoritative_textbook\",\"source_version\":\"第10版\",\"source_section\":\"第三篇 循环系统疾病\",\"source_page\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_text\":\"1. 经皮冠状动脉介入术（percutaneous coronary intervention，PCI） 治疗冠心病的一种最常用、最成熟的介入技术，它是在血管造影仪的引导下，通过特制的导管、导丝、球囊、支架等，对狭窄或阻塞的冠状动脉进行血运重建的治疗方法。操作器械的改进，尤其是药物支架的出现大大改善了冠心病病人的预后和生活质量。目前还有药物球囊、生物可吸收支架等新技术应用于临床。\",\"recommendation_class\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_level\":\"N/A\",\"guideline_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\"}]", "evidence_level": "N/A", "source_code": "DIS-CARD-CAD-CHD", "relationCategory": "evidence"}

{"relationType": "supported_by_evidence", "evidence_count": 1, "source_page": "N/A", "batch_id": "FOUNDATION-CARD-20260624-001", "evidence_id": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00116", "scope_filter_rule": "CDSS查询证据时必须按当前疾病或大类过滤 disease_code", "document_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "evidence_scope_code": "DIS-CARD-CAD-ATHEROSCLEROSIS", "schema_version": "V1.4", "source_version": "第10版", "scope_governance_batch": "20260714_证据范围字段回填", "updated_at": "2026-07-14 20:38:16", "recommendation_class": "N/A", "id": "REL-7C48D308FD80", "evidence_ids": ["EVD-CARD-FOUND-00116"], "review_status": "approved", "segment_id": "LINE-5463", "source_name": "《内科学（第10版）》.docx", "source_section": "第三篇 循环系统疾病", "disease_code": "DIS-CARD-CAD-ATHEROSCLEROSIS", "document_ids": ["DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6"], "target_code": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00116", "source_names": ["《内科学（第10版）》.docx"], "confidence": 1.0, "source_type": "authoritative_textbook", "scope_filter_required": true, "clinical_review_status": "not_applicable", "evidence_text": "5. 心脏 CT 以往心脏 CT 主要用于观察心脏结构、心肌、心包和大血管改变，而近几年，冠状动脉 CT 血管造影（CTA）逐渐成为评估冠状动脉粥样硬化的无创成像方法，显示冠状动脉主要分支病变情况、冠状动脉解剖异常和桥血管情况，是筛查和诊断冠心病的重要手段。", "guideline_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "source_types": ["authoritative_textbook"], "updated_by": "codex", "formal_cdss_ready": false, "provenance_records_json": "[{\"document_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\",\"segment_id\":\"LINE-5463\",\"source_name\":\"《内科学（第10版）》.docx\",\"source_type\":\"authoritative_textbook\",\"source_version\":\"第10版\",\"source_section\":\"第三篇 循环系统疾病\",\"source_page\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_text\":\"5. 心脏 CT 以往心脏 CT 主要用于观察心脏结构、心肌、心包和大血管改变，而近几年，冠状动脉 CT 血管造影（CTA）逐渐成为评估冠状动脉粥样硬化的无创成像方法，显示冠状动脉主要分支病变情况、冠状动脉解剖异常和桥血管情况，是筛查和诊断冠心病的重要手段。\",\"recommendation_class\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_level\":\"N/A\",\"guideline_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\"}]", "evidence_level": "N/A", "source_code": "DIS-CARD-CAD-ATHEROSCLEROSIS", "relationCategory": "evidence"}

"（四）经食管心脏电生理检查 经食管心脏电生理检查，又称为食管心房调搏术，由于解剖上左心房后壁毗邻食管，将食管电极经鼻腔送入食管的心房水平，可记录心房和心室电活动（即食管心电图），并能进行心房快速起搏或程序电刺激。食管心电图能清晰地识别心房与心室电活动，确定房室电活动的关系，鉴别室上性心动过速的类型，以及宽 QRS 室上性心动过速与室性心动过速的甄别，经食管快速起搏心房可使预激图形更为清晰，有助于确定不典型预激综合征病人。应用电刺激可诱发", "guideline_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "source_types": ["authoritative_textbook"], "updated_by": "codex", "formal_cdss_ready": false, 波的各种快速型异位心律失常，如药物治疗无效的阵发性室上性心动过速、心房扑动、心房颤动及室性心动过速。电复律前一定要核查仪器上的“同步”功能处于开启状态。", "guideline_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "source_types": ["authoritative_textbook"], "updated_by": "codex", {"relationType": "supported_by_evidence", "evidence_count": 1, "source_page": "N/A", "batch_id": "FOUNDATION-CARD-20260624-001", "evidence_id": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00312", "scope_filter_rule": "CDSS查询证据时必须按当前疾病或大类过滤 disease_code", "document_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "evidence_scope_code": "DIS-CARD-CM-RCM", "schema_version": "V1.4", "source_version": "第10版", "scope_governance_batch": "20260714_证据范围字段回填", "updated_at": "2026-07-14 20:38:16", "recommendation_class": "N/A", "id": "REL-744A598B223B", "evidence_ids": ["EVD-CARD-FOUND-00312"], "review_status": "approved", "segment_id": "LINE-9019", "source_name": "《内科学（第10版）》.docx", "source_section": "第三篇 循环系统疾病", "disease_code": "DIS-CARD-CM-RCM", "document_ids": ["DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6"], "target_code": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00312", "source_names": ["《内科学（第10版）》.docx"], "confidence": 1.0, "source_type": "authoritative_textbook", "scope_filter_required": true, "clinical_review_status": "not_applicable", "evidence_text": "【病理改变与病理生理】 本病病因复杂、病理改变各异。经典 RCM 的病理改变为心内膜纤维化、钙化及附壁血栓，心内膜下心肌变性坏死及瘢痕形成；各类 RCM 有各自的病理特征，如 CA 的淀粉样物质表现为刚果红染色呈砖红色、偏振光显微镜下呈苹果绿双折光。以上改变导致室壁僵硬、心室充盈严重受限及体循环和肺循环淤血。", "guideline_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "source_types": ["authoritative_textbook"], "updated_by": "codex", "formal_cdss_ready": false, "provenance_records_json": "[{\"document_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\",\"segment_id\":\"LINE-9019\",\"source_name\":\"《内科学（第10版）》.docx\",\"source_type\":\"authoritative_textbook\",\"source_version\":\"第10版\",\"source_section\":\"第三篇 循环系统疾病\",\"source_page\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_text\":\"【病理改变与病理生理】 本病病因复杂、病理改变各异。经典 RCM 的病理改变为心内膜纤维化、钙化及附壁血栓，心内膜下心肌变性坏死及瘢痕形成；各类 RCM 有各自的病理特征，如 CA 的淀粉样物质表现为刚果红染色呈砖红色、偏振光显微镜下呈苹果绿双折光。以上改变导致室壁僵硬、心室充盈严重受限及体循环和肺循环淤血。\",\"recommendation_class\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_level\":\"N/A\",\"guideline_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\"}]", "evidence_level": "N/A", "source_code": "DIS-CARD-CM-RCM", "relationCategory": "evidence"}

{"relationType": "supported_by_evidence", "evidence_count": 1, "source_page": "N/A", "batch_id": "FOUNDATION-CARD-20260624-001", "evidence_id": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00274", "scope_filter_rule": "CDSS查询证据时必须按当前疾病或大类过滤 disease_code", "document_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "evidence_scope_code": "DIS-CARD-CM-HCM", "schema_version": "V1.4", "source_version": "第10版", "scope_governance_batch": "20260714_证据范围字段回填", "updated_at": "2026-07-14 20:38:16", "recommendation_class": "N/A", "id": "REL-57BC357FCBB3", "evidence_ids": ["EVD-CARD-FOUND-00274"], "review_status": "approved", "segment_id": "LINE-5575", "source_name": "《内科学（第10版）》.docx", "source_section": "第三篇 循环系统疾病", "disease_code": "DIS-CARD-CM-HCM", "document_ids": ["DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6"], "target_code": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00274", "source_names": ["《内科学（第10版）》.docx"], "confidence": 1.0, "source_type": "authoritative_textbook", "scope_filter_required": true, "clinical_review_status": "not_applicable", "evidence_text": "2. 心室舒张和充盈受限 心室充盈受限是指在静脉回心血量无明显减少的情况下，因心脏本身的病变引起的心脏舒张和充盈障碍。如，肥厚型心肌病时肥厚心肌的顺应性减退，舒张能力降低，使心室舒张期充盈障碍；房颤快心室率时心室舒张期缩短，房室收缩不同步，心室充盈受限。最终导致", "guideline_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "source_types": ["authoritative_textbook"], "updated_by": "codex", "formal_cdss_ready": false, "provenance_records_json": "[{\"document_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\",\"segment_id\":\"LINE-5575\",\"source_name\":\"《内科学（第10版）》.docx\",\"source_type\":\"authoritative_textbook\",\"source_version\":\"第10版\",\"source_section\":\"第三篇 循环系统疾病\",\"source_page\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_text\":\"2. 心室舒张和充盈受限 心室充盈受限是指在静脉回心血量无明显减少的情况下，因心脏本身的病变引起的心脏舒张和充盈障碍。如，肥厚型心肌病时肥厚心肌的顺应性减退，舒张能力降低，使心室舒张期充盈障碍；房颤快心室率时心室舒张期缩短，房室收缩不同步，心室充盈受限。最终导致\",\"recommendation_class\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_level\":\"N/A\",\"guideline_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\"}]", "evidence_level": "N/A", "source_code": "DIS-CARD-CM-HCM", "relationCategory": "evidence"}

{"relationType": "supported_by_evidence", "evidence_count": 1, "source_page": "N/A", "batch_id": "FOUNDATION-CARD-20260624-001", "evidence_id": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00221", "scope_filter_rule": "CDSS查询证据时必须按当前疾病或大类过滤 disease_code", "document_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "evidence_scope_code": "DIS-CARD-HTN-ESSENTIAL", "schema_version": "V1.4", "source_version": "第10版", "scope_governance_batch": "20260714_证据范围字段回填", "updated_at": "2026-07-14 20:38:16", "recommendation_class": "N/A", "id": "REL-41AA9E202084", "evidence_ids": ["EVD-CARD-FOUND-00221"], "review_status": "approved", "segment_id": "LINE-8221", "source_name": "《内科学（第10版）》.docx", "source_section": "第三篇 循环系统疾病", "disease_code": "DIS-CARD-HTN-ESSENTIAL", "document_ids": ["DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6"], "target_code": "EVD-CARD-FOUND-00221", "source_names": ["《内科学（第10版）》.docx"], "confidence": 1.0, "source_type": "authoritative_textbook", "scope_filter_required": true, "clinical_review_status": "not_applicable", "evidence_text": "【病因和发病机制】 原发性高血压是遗传和环境因素交互作用的结果，并非一种同质性疾病，不同个体间病因和发病机制不尽相同。高血压病程较长，进展一般较缓慢，不同阶段始动、维持和加速机制不同，各种发病机制间也存在交互作用。因此，高血压是多因素、多环节、多阶段、多机制和个体差异性较大的疾病。", "guideline_id": "DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6", "source_types": ["authoritative_textbook"], "updated_by": "codex", "formal_cdss_ready": false, "provenance_records_json": "[{\"document_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\",\"segment_id\":\"LINE-8221\",\"source_name\":\"《内科学（第10版）》.docx\",\"source_type\":\"authoritative_textbook\",\"source_version\":\"第10版\",\"source_section\":\"第三篇 循环系统疾病\",\"source_page\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_text\":\"【病因和发病机制】 原发性高血压是遗传和环境因素交互作用的结果，并非一种同质性疾病，不同个体间病因和发病机制不尽相同。高血压病程较长，进展一般较缓慢，不同阶段始动、维持和加速机制不同，各种发病机制间也存在交互作用。因此，高血压是多因素、多环节、多阶段、多机制和个体差异性较大的疾病。\",\"recommendation_class\":\"N/A\",\"evidence_level\":\"N/A\",\"guideline_id\":\"DOC-CF62B75AEC93F1A6\"}]", "evidence_level": "N/A", "source_code": "DIS-CARD-HTN-ESSENTIAL", "relationCategory": "evidence"}
